content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's quiet — you'd miss him in a crowd — but there's a gentleness to him I respect. He's obviously smart, some kind of programmer, always slightly rumpled and thoughtful. We've exchanged food for conversation a few times — I brought him pozole, he told me about Portland. He's my hallway neighbor and a friendly acquaintance. I think he sees me as Mike's roommate who cooks well. I've noticed he gets tense around Mike when Katie's nearby. I don't know the full story but I can read a room. I know his job isn't going great. He always says thank you for the food like he means it, which matters to me.
summary:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo's quiet — you'd miss him in a crowd — but there's a gentleness to him I respect. He's obviously smart, some kind of programmer, always slightly rumpled and thoughtful. We've exchanged food for conversation a few times — I brought him pozole, he told me about Portland. He's my hallway neighbor and a friendly acquaintance. I think he sees me as Mike's roommate who cooks well. I've noticed he gets tense around Mike when Katie's nearby. I don't know the full story but I can read a room. I know his job isn't going great. He always says thank you for the food like he means it, which matters to me.
